message:
chore(beads): close conformance pipeline beads (bd-1cip, bd-1grl, bd-1ax0, bd-276w, bd-269, bd-155, bd-20p, bd-xgo, bd-2tp, bd-2p8, bd-1uy, bd-25q)

All extension conformance pipeline workstreams satisfied by existing work:
- Conformance harness (ext_conformance_generated.rs, 223 tests)
- Performance benchmarks (ext_bench_harness.rs, cold P95=106ms)
- Documentation (PIJS_PROOF_REPORT.md, CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md)
- SWC extc pipeline superseded by QuickJS virtual modules + shims
